description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a global before_script to run 'apt -qq update' and 'cabal update', caches the .cabal-store and dist-newstyle/cache per job, and provides a cassandra:3.11.2 service with CASSANDRA_HOST variable. Define four test jobs named test:8.2, test:8.4, test:8.6, and test:8.8, each using the corresponding haskell:8.x Docker image and running in the default test stage. In the test:8.2 job add an extra before_script to import the key 2EAF8B8BB12873F5, then install build-essential and libssl-dev silently, and execute 'cabal --store-dir=$STORE_DIR new-test'. In the other three jobs install the same packages and run 'cabal --store-dir=$STORE_DIR new-test' (or 'cabal --store-dir=$STORE_DIR test' for 8.8) without the extra key step. Set STORE_DIR variable to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cabal-store and ensure each job uses the cache key $CI_JOB_NAME.
